name: Shaker Sugar Pie (Kh)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the pie shell and bake at 450°F for 5 minutes. Set aside.
2. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F.
3. Mix the brown sugar with flour until blended. Spoon over the bottom of the partially baked pie shell.
4. Combine the cream, vanilla extract, and nutmeg; pour over the sugar in the pie shell.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 55 minutes, or until the crust is lightly browned and the filling is set.
